caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold lettering, and a watch on his left wrist sits in a podcast studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. Above him, a blue banner reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT" is visible on the table. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, shifting his head slightly and speaking, while his hands remain mostly still on the table. The camera angle and the surrounding equipment, including a black device to his left, stay constant across the frames.
